entity.summary: LINE-backed global centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by LVC USA Inc. It announced a phased voluntary shutdown in late 2022 and scheduled withdrawals to end on 2023-03-31.
entity.notes: BITFRONT was previously known as BITBOX. Terminal date uses the published withdrawal-end date in the phased closure schedule.

events.title: BITFRONT launched
events.description: BITFRONT launched in February 2020 as LINE's global cryptocurrency exchange, succeeding the earlier BITBOX branding.
events.notes: Month-level launch date from exchange database reference.

events.title: Phased shutdown announced
events.description: BITFRONT announced a phased voluntary shutdown, including suspended sign-ups, later trading suspension, and a final withdrawal deadline of 2023-03-31.
events.notes: Death date is set to the scheduled withdrawal shutdown date, not the announcement date.

evidence.title: Bitfront trade volume and market listings
evidence.notes: Used for February 2020 launch, prior BITBOX branding, operator context, and closed-service status.

evidence.title: Social-Media Giant LINE Closes Its Crypto Exchange Bitfront
evidence.notes: Used for closure announcement and withdrawal deadline.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Bitfront shuts down
evidence.notes: Reuters-syndicated source for the shutdown schedule and March 2023 withdrawal deadline.

evidence.title: LINE to end BITFRONT crypto exchange service
evidence.notes: Japanese coverage of LINE's phased service-end announcement and schedule.
